hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains only the thinking/planning process and no actual clinical note was produced. There is no clinical content to evaluate, but the output fundamentally fails to deliver a note.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and does not contain a completed clinical note. The instructions required returning ONLY the completed note, which was not done.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was generated. All transcript content is missing from the output.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured thinking/reasoning text.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was applied in any clinical note output since no note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains extreme repetition, with the same checks repeated dozens of times in an endless loop.
